title: euphrasia arctica var. submollis
intro: Euphrasia arctica var. submollis is a variety of the Euphrasia arctica plant, which is a type of alpine grass of the family Orobanchaceae. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to reduce inflammation and alleviate symptoms of eye disorders. The health benefits of Euphrasia arctica var. submollis include its potential to treat conjunctivitis, dry eyes, and other eye-related issues, as well as its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties. Euphrasia arctica var. submollis can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and eye drops, making it a popular natural remedy in traditional medicine.
